reason: Contains pro-ISIS terminology including 'Islamic State' hashtag, celebrates violence against military forces, uses sectarian term 'Safavid' (Safawi) which is commonly used by ISIS to refer to Iraqi forces, and starts with 'Allahu Akbar' in context of militant actions
original_post: الله أكبر #الدولة_الإسلامية تبيد رتل للقوات الخاصة والجيش الصفوي في سامراء واختفاء الجثث والجنود بشكل غريب !
